summary: AI Features testing completed. Backend: 28/28 tests PASSED. Frontend: All AI features verified including AI Assistant FAB, Inbox (Gmail not connected state), Highlights/Highlight Advisor, Analytics/Outreach Analysis, Journey page AI section (Next Step, Journey Summary, School Insight). All LLM-powered endpoints working via Emergent key with Claude Sonnet.

issues: The 'Made with Emergent' badge at bottom-right can intercept clicks on the AI FAB button (z-index/position conflict). This is a minor UX issue - using force=True in Playwright bypasses it, and manual clicks work fine.

critical_code_review_comments: All AI endpoints use real LLM calls via Emergent key - no mocking
AI response times are 5-20 seconds which is expected for real LLM calls
Gmail endpoints correctly return 403 when not connected
AI Assistant drawer supports multi-turn conversations with session history
Journey page AI section has 3 AI buttons: Next Step, Journey Summary, School Insight
Email Composer has AI Draft feature with 4 email types: intro, follow_up, thank_you, interest_update
Outreach Analysis provides AI-generated insights with score ring, strengths, improvements
Highlight Advisor has quick question buttons and generates structured video advice
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing athlete profile with 12 programs in pipeline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AI features tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_ai_features.py cover: draft-email (4 tests), next-step (2), journey-summary (2), assistant (5 including sessions/history), outreach-analysis (1), highlight-advice (2), coach-watch (2), school-insight (3), gmail status (3), auth-required (4). Frontend verified: AI FAB at bottom-right opens drawer with suggestions, inbox shows connect Gmail prompt, highlights page has advisor with quick questions, analytics page shows outreach analysis, journey page has AI section with 3 buttons.

Backend_AI_Endpoints.POST_ai_draft_email_intro: PASS - Generates intro email with subject/body
Backend_AI_Endpoints.POST_ai_next_step: PASS - Returns next_step, reasoning, urgency, action_type
Backend_AI_Endpoints.POST_ai_assistant_single: PASS - Returns AI response with session_id
Backend_AI_Endpoints.GET_ai_outreach_analysis: PASS - Returns stats and AI insights

Backend_Gmail_Endpoints.GET_gmail_connect: PASS - Returns OAuth URL or 500 if not configured

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real LLM calls via Emergent key with Claude Sonnet (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929)
